textByHash.26cef3913628c41c1356518022984ca7ed83d3a0: I'm sorry, my friend... I do not understand your meaning. Please, time is short... Take this scroll to Sir Tiffy. You will find him in Falador park... You should not...read it... It contains information for his eyes only.
textByHash.8143ae1fca425264d51d89715ff8dee961856c1d: My name is...Sir Gerry. I am...a member of a secret...society of knights. My time is short and I need...your help.
textByHash.9229b47c04f5d8e4d23a1c1ac8b7c9960a8602b1: All right, men, destroy that evil sorceress... and her temple with her!
textByHash.e57a368554b0c5916f77f91fb11076de41d532cc: Yes! Praise Saradomin! You...have been sent in...my hour of need. Please, take...this scroll to Sir Tiffy in Falador park... You should not...read it.
